segments.text: Thank you for calling Speedy Auto Repair, this is Michael speaking.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Hi Michael, it’s Bob Anderson. How are you?
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Hi Bob! I’m doing well, thanks for asking. How about you?
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: I’m good, thanks. I wanted to schedule an oil change for my car.
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Absolutely, we can get that done. When would you like to come in?
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: I prefer mornings, if you have any slots available.
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Let me check... How about this Thursday at 8:00 AM?
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: That works for me!
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Perfect, I’ll pencil you in for Thursday at 8:00 AM.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Great! Also, I’ve been hearing some weird noises coming from the brakes.
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: I see. Would you like me to schedule a brake inspection during your visit?
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Yes, I think that would be a good idea.
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Alright, I’ll add a brake inspection to your appointment.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: How much will that cost?
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: The brake inspection is $30 and takes about 30 minutes.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Sounds good.
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Is there anything else you’re concerned about?
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Actually, I noticed my air conditioning isn’t as cold as it used to be.
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: We can check that too. An A/C service is $120, which includes inspection and recharge.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Let’s add that to the list as well.
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: So that’s an oil change, brake inspection, and A/C service.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Correct.
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Just to confirm, your appointment is Thursday at 8:00 AM for all three services.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Yes, that’s right!
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Great, I’ll also have a technician look into those brake noises.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Thank you, Michael. I appreciate your help.
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: My pleasure, Bob! We look forward to seeing you.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: I’ll see you then. Have a good day!
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: You too, take care!
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: (After the call) I need to remind Sarah about Bob's brake inspection and air conditioning service on Thursday.
segments.speaker: local party

transcription.text: Thank you for calling Speedy Auto Repair, this is Michael speaking. Hi Michael, it’s Bob Anderson. How are you? Hi Bob! I’m doing well, thanks for asking. How about you? I’m good, thanks. I wanted to schedule an oil change for my car. Absolutely, we can get that done. When would you like to come in? I prefer mornings, if you have any slots available. Let me check... How about this Thursday at 8:00 AM? That works for me! Perfect, I’ll pencil you in for Thursday at 8:00 AM. Great! Also, I’ve been hearing some weird noises coming from the brakes. I see. Would you like me to schedule a brake inspection during your visit? Yes, I think that would be a good idea. Alright, I’ll add a brake inspection to your appointment. How much will that cost? The brake inspection is $30 and takes about 30 minutes. Sounds good. Is there anything else you’re concerned about? Actually, I noticed my air conditioning isn’t as cold as it used to be. We can check that too. An A/C service is $120, which includes inspection and recharge. Let’s add that to the list as well. So that’s an oil change, brake inspection, and A/C service. Correct. Just to confirm, your appointment is Thursday at 8:00 AM for all three services. Yes, that’s right! Great, I’ll also have a technician look into those brake noises. Thank you, Michael. I appreciate your help. My pleasure, Bob! We look forward to seeing you. I’ll see you then. Have a good day! You too, take care! (After the call) I need to remind Sarah about Bob's brake inspection and air conditioning service on Thursday.
